ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOSHUA ARCE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES WHEN PLAINTIFF SUFFERED ACTUAL INJURY AND WHEN DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF TERMINATED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SATISFY HIS INITIAL BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PROVE HER CONCEALMENT CLAIM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Joshua Arce'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: kimberly a. fanady, esq., law offices of kimberly a. fanady, 415.986.8467, for plaintiff kathryn spencer.
joshua a. arce, esq., 415.252.9700, defendant in pro per.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant Joshua Arce'S Motion For Summary Judgment, or in the alternative, for summary adjudication is denied. There are triable issues when plaintiff suffered actual injury and when defendant's representation of plaintiff terminated. Defendant did not satisfy his initial burden of showing that that plaintiff cannot prove her concealment claim. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
